list.name: service
list.label: Service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT ServiceName FROM otel_traces ORDER BY ServiceName

list.name: span_name
list.label: Span name
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT SpanName FROM otel_traces WHERE ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) ORDER BY SpanName

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time, ServiceName, count() AS spans FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) AND SpanName IN (${span_name:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, ServiceName ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time, SeverityText, count() AS logs FROM otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, SeverityText ORDER BY time
SELECT count() AS error_spans FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND StatusCode = 'Error' AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) AND SpanName IN (${span_name:singlequote})
SELECT count() AS spans FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) AND SpanName IN (${span_name:singlequote})

panels.title: LLM avg latency / throughput
panels.description: llm.embed shows average end-to-end request time. llm.chat shows average generated token throughput from completion_tokens / span duration.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, metric, value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time, 'llm.embed avg end-to-end ms' AS metric, avg(Duration) / 1e6 AS value FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanName = 'llm.embed' AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, metric UNION ALL SELECT time, 'llm.chat avg tokens/s' AS metric, avg(tokens_per_sec) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time, JSONExtractInt(SpanAttributes['result'], 'usage', 'completion_tokens') / nullIf(Duration / 1e9, 0) AS tokens_per_sec FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND SpanName = 'llm.chat' AND StatusCode != 'Error' AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) AND JSONExtractInt(SpanAttributes['result'], 'usage', 'completion_tokens') > 0) GROUP BY time, metric) ORDER BY time, metric

SELECT Timestamp, ServiceName, SpanName, SpanKind, round(Duration / 1e9, 3) AS duration_s, StatusCode, TraceId, SpanId, ParentSpanId FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) AND SpanName IN (${span_name:singlequote}) ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 200
SELECT Timestamp, SeverityText, ServiceName, Body, TraceId, SpanId FROM otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName IN (${service:singlequote}) ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 200
